query:
INSERT INTO users (id, username, email, birth_year, country_code, consent_given, consent_at, otp_code, otp_expires_at, otp_attempts)
           VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, true, NOW(), $6, $7, 0)
           ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE SET
               otp_code = $6,
               otp_expires_at = $7,
               otp_attempts = 0
